name: tooltip
label: Tooltip
description: A lightweight, pure-Alpine tooltip that appears on hover or focus, with four positions and an optional arrow.

props.name: position
props.description: Where the tooltip appears relative to the trigger.

props.name: content
props.description: Tooltip text. Use the 'tip' slot for rich content.

slots.name: tip
slots.description: Rich tooltip content (overrides the content prop).
